learnings.text: Provider init order matters: Loading SentenceTransformer before checking vector dimensions wasted ~55s on every init. Auto-detection should ALWAYS happen before loading heavyweight models. The fix: check vectors_v2.db dimensions first, only load local model if actually needed. (D1.3)

D1.2: Audit vs actual cleanup discrepancy. Audit showed 2,504 stale resources in vectors_v2.db, but actual cleanup only found 2. brain.db audit showed 839 orphaned resources but cleanup found 0. This suggests concurrent cleanup activity or the audit was from a different database state. Always verify baseline before cleanup operations.
D1.1: Database lock contention during ANN index rebuild - vectors_v2.db was locked by other processes. Use sqlite3.connect(timeout=60) or wait for locks to clear.

D1.2: Audit data can go stale fast. The D1.1 ANN rebuild may have been preceded by a cleanup that resolved all staleness (9,683→7,145 resources, 0 stale). Always re-check counts at purge time rather than relying on earlier audit snapshots.
